forbidden_capabilities: model-host mutation, process signalling or conversion execution
production-server fallback or production workload access
model, GGUF, source weight or large artifact transfer
full model or log content publication
secrets, private keys or credentials in progress evidence
acceptance: owner-only issue command is exact-main and non-automatic
command and bounded result are isolated in dedicated issue 2950
model-host inspection uses dedicated TAI_MODEL key-only transport
remote command is read-only and bounded
PID liveness is checked with signal zero only
source, partial, active-log, step and GGUF progress is metadata-only
only the latest run root and bounded last lines are reported
TAI Foundation, CI and security/runtime gates pass
